parameters.content:
## MeshMinds PrintChecker v2

### One-time setup
Settings → Environment Variables:
`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` = `sk-ant-api03-...`

---

### Why no HTTP Request scraper node?
MakerWorld and Printables use Cloudflare bot protection — direct
HTTP scraping returns 403. Instead, Code nodes use
`$helpers.httpRequest()` to call their official APIs directly:
- MakerWorld: `GET /api/v1/design-service/design/detail?designId=ID`
- Printables:  `POST https://api.printables.com/graphql/`
- Other URLs:  plain HTML scrape (still attempted)

---

### Flow: POST /idea  (fires when URL is pasted)
```
Webhook: URL Submit
  → Fetch & Extract (idea)   API call → structured JSON
  → Respond: URL Received    { status, productContext }
```
Frontend stores productContext while user fills questionnaire.

### Flow: POST /idea2  (fires on analysis submit)
```
Webhook: Analysis Request
  → Code: Resolve Context
      body.productContext → fast path (already fetched)
      body.description   → free-text idea
      body.url only      → signal scrape needed
  → IF: Needs Scrape?
      TRUE  → Fetch & Extract (idea2)  fallback API call
      FALSE → skip
  → Build Claude Prompt
  → Call Claude  (claude-sonnet-4-6)
  → Extract Analysis JSON
  → Respond: Analysis Complete
```
